# Code of Conduct

## Purpose
We want a safe, welcoming, and productive community. This code of conduct sets clear expectations for participation.

## Our Standards
- Be respectful, patient, and kind.
- Focus on constructive feedback and collaboration.
- Assume good intent and ask questions before escalating.
- Respect privacy and avoid sharing sensitive information.

## Unacceptable Behavior
- Harassment, discrimination, or personal attacks.
- Threats, intimidation, or incitement of violence.
- Unwanted sexual attention or advances.
- Publishing private information without consent.

## Scope
This policy applies in all project spaces and when representing the project.

## Reporting
Report issues to the maintainers via the security advisory page:
https://github.com/bora-yarkin/Mapty/security/advisories

## Enforcement
Maintainers may take any action they deem appropriate, including warnings, content removal, or bans.
